mapper.select:
SELECT c.id AS course_id, c.name AS course_name, c.code AS course_code, u.real_name AS teacher_name, c.semester AS semester,
-- 选课人数（子查询） (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = c.id) AS enrolled_count,
-- 作业总数（子查询） (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a WHERE a.course_id = c.id) AS assignment_count,
-- 已提交人次（跨 submission + course_student） COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) AS submitted_count,
-- 未提交人次 = 作业总数 × 选课人数 - 已提交人次 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a WHERE a.course_id = c.id) * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = c.id) - COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) AS unsubmitted_count,
-- 提交率 = 已提交人次 / (作业总数 × 选课人数) × 100 ROUND( CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a WHERE a.course_id = c.id) * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = c.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) * 100.0 / ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a WHERE a.course_id = c.id) * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = c.id)) END, 1 ) AS submission_rate,
-- 迟交人次 SUM(CASE WHEN sub.is_late = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_count,
-- 迟交率 ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN sub.is_late = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) END, 1 ) AS late_rate,
-- 平均分 ROUND(AVG(g.score), 1) AS average_score,
-- 最高分 MAX(g.score) AS highest_score,
-- 最低分 MIN(g.score) AS lowest_score,
-- 及格率（≥60分） ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(g.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN g.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(g.id) END, 1 ) AS pass_rate,
-- 已批改人次 COUNT(g.id) AS graded_count
FROM course c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id LEFT JOIN assignment asn ON asn.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN submission sub ON sub.assignment_id = asn.id LEFT JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id
AND c.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
AND (c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.code, u.real_name, c.semester ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.id AS course_id, c.name AS course_name, c.code AS course_code, u.real_name AS teacher_name, c.semester AS semester, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = c.id) AS enrolled_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a WHERE a.course_id = c.id) AS assignment_count, COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) AS submitted_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a WHERE a.course_id = c.id) * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = c.id) - COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) AS unsubmitted_count, ROUND( CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a WHERE a.course_id = c.id) * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = c.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) * 100.0 / ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment a WHERE a.course_id = c.id) * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = c.id)) END, 1 ) AS submission_rate, SUM(CASE WHEN sub.is_late = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_count, ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN sub.is_late = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) END, 1 ) AS late_rate, ROUND(AVG(g.score), 1) AS average_score, MAX(g.score) AS highest_score, MIN(g.score) AS lowest_score, ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(g.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN g.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(g.id) END, 1 ) AS pass_rate, COUNT(g.id) AS graded_count FROM course c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id LEFT JOIN assignment asn ON asn.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN submission sub ON sub.assignment_id = asn.id LEFT JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE c.id = #{courseId} GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.code, u.real_name, c.semester

SELECT stu.id AS student_id, stu.real_name AS student_name, stu.student_no AS student_no,
-- 选课总数 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.student_id = stu.id) AS enrolled_course_count,
-- 全部作业数（所选课程中的所有作业） (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment asn WHERE asn.course_id IN ( SELECT cs2.course_id FROM course_student cs2 WHERE cs2.student_id = stu.id )) AS total_assignments,
-- 已提交数 COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) AS submitted_count,
-- 已批改数 COUNT(g.id) AS graded_count,
-- 提交率 ROUND( CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment asn WHERE asn.course_id IN ( SELECT cs2.course_id FROM course_student cs2 WHERE cs2.student_id = stu.id )) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment asn WHERE asn.course_id IN ( SELECT cs2.course_id FROM course_student cs2 WHERE cs2.student_id = stu.id )) END, 1 ) AS submission_rate,
-- 加权平均分 ROUND(AVG(g.score), 1) AS overall_average,
-- 单次最高分 MAX(g.score) AS highest_score,
-- 单次最低分（仅已批改的，排除 NULL） MIN(g.score) AS lowest_score,
-- 及格次数 SUM(CASE WHEN g.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pass_count,
-- 不及格次数 SUM(CASE WHEN g.score < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fail_count,
-- 及格率 ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(g.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN g.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(g.id) END, 1 ) AS pass_rate
FROM user stu LEFT JOIN submission sub ON sub.student_id = stu.id LEFT JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id
stu.role = 'STUDENT' AND stu.status = 1
AND (stu.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR stu.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
GROUP BY stu.id, stu.real_name, stu.student_no ORDER BY overall_average DESC, submitted_count DESC

SELECT stu.id AS student_id, stu.real_name AS student_name, stu.student_no AS student_no, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.student_id = stu.id) AS enrolled_course_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment asn WHERE asn.course_id IN ( SELECT cs2.course_id FROM course_student cs2 WHERE cs2.student_id = stu.id )) AS total_assignments, COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) AS submitted_count, COUNT(g.id) AS graded_count, ROUND( CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment asn WHERE asn.course_id IN ( SELECT cs2.course_id FROM course_student cs2 WHERE cs2.student_id = stu.id )) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment asn WHERE asn.course_id IN ( SELECT cs2.course_id FROM course_student cs2 WHERE cs2.student_id = stu.id )) END, 1 ) AS submission_rate, ROUND(AVG(g.score), 1) AS overall_average, MAX(g.score) AS highest_score, MIN(g.score) AS lowest_score, SUM(CASE WHEN g.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pass_count, SUM(CASE WHEN g.score < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fail_count, ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(g.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN g.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(g.id) END, 1 ) AS pass_rate FROM user stu LEFT JOIN submission sub ON sub.student_id = stu.id LEFT JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE stu.id = #{studentId} GROUP BY stu.id, stu.real_name, stu.student_no

SELECT stu.id AS student_id, stu.real_name AS student_name, stu.student_no AS student_no, 1 AS enrolled_course_count, COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) AS submitted_count, COUNT(g.id) AS graded_count, ROUND(AVG(g.score), 1) AS overall_average, MAX(g.score) AS highest_score, MIN(g.score) AS lowest_score, SUM(CASE WHEN g.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pass_count, SUM(CASE WHEN g.score < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fail_count FROM user stu INNER JOIN course_student cs ON cs.student_id = stu.id AND cs.course_id = #{courseId} INNER JOIN assignment asn ON asn.course_id = cs.course_id LEFT JOIN submission sub ON sub.assignment_id = asn.id AND sub.student_id = stu.id LEFT JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id GROUP BY stu.id, stu.real_name, stu.student_no ORDER BY overall_average DESC

SELECT asn.id AS assignment_id, asn.title AS assignment_title, c.name AS course_name, u.real_name AS teacher_name, asn.deadline AS deadline, asn.max_score AS max_score,
-- 应提交人数（选课人数） (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = asn.course_id) AS total_students,
-- 已提交人数 COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) AS submitted_count,
-- 未提交人数 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = asn.course_id) - COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) AS unsubmitted_count,
-- 提交率 ROUND( CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = asn.course_id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = asn.course_id) END, 1 ) AS submission_rate,
-- 按时提交数 SUM(CASE WHEN sub.is_late = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_count,
-- 迟交数 SUM(CASE WHEN sub.is_late = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_count,
-- 迟交率 ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN sub.is_late = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) END, 1 ) AS late_rate,
-- 已批改数 COUNT(g.id) AS graded_count,
-- 待批改数 COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) - COUNT(g.id) AS ungraded_count,
-- 批改进度 ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COUNT(g.id) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) END, 1 ) AS grading_progress,
-- 成绩统计 ROUND(AVG(g.score), 1) AS average_score, MAX(g.score) AS highest_score, MIN(g.score) AS lowest_score,
-- 及格率 ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(g.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN g.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(g.id) END, 1 ) AS pass_rate,
-- 分数段分布（CASE WHEN 分段统计） SUM(CASE WHEN g.score >= 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS excellent_count, SUM(CASE WHEN g.score >= 80 AND g.score < 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS good_count, SUM(CASE WHEN g.score >= 70 AND g.score < 80 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS medium_count, SUM(CASE WHEN g.score >= 60 AND g.score < 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pass_count, SUM(CASE WHEN g.score < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fail_count
FROM assignment asn LEFT JOIN course c ON c.id = asn.course_id LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = c.teacher_id LEFT JOIN submission sub ON sub.assignment_id = asn.id LEFT JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id
WHERE asn.course_id = #{courseId}
GROUP BY asn.id, asn.title, c.name, u.real_name, asn.deadline, asn.max_score ORDER BY asn.created_at DESC

SELECT asn.id AS assignment_id, asn.title AS assignment_title, c.name AS course_name, u.real_name AS teacher_name, asn.deadline AS deadline, asn.max_score AS max_score, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = asn.course_id) AS total_students, COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) AS submitted_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = asn.course_id) - COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) AS unsubmitted_count, ROUND( CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = asn.course_id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.course_id = asn.course_id) END, 1 ) AS submission_rate, SUM(CASE WHEN sub.is_late = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_count, SUM(CASE WHEN sub.is_late = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_count, ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN sub.is_late = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) END, 1 ) AS late_rate, COUNT(g.id) AS graded_count, COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) - COUNT(g.id) AS ungraded_count, ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COUNT(g.id) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) END, 1 ) AS grading_progress, ROUND(AVG(g.score), 1) AS average_score, MAX(g.score) AS highest_score, MIN(g.score) AS lowest_score, ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(g.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN g.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(g.id) END, 1 ) AS pass_rate, SUM(CASE WHEN g.score >= 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS excellent_count, SUM(CASE WHEN g.score >= 80 AND g.score < 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS good_count, SUM(CASE WHEN g.score >= 70 AND g.score < 80 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS medium_count, SUM(CASE WHEN g.score >= 60 AND g.score < 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pass_count, SUM(CASE WHEN g.score < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fail_count FROM assignment asn LEFT JOIN course c ON c.id = asn.course_id LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = c.teacher_id LEFT JOIN submission sub ON sub.assignment_id = asn.id LEFT JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE asn.id = #{assignmentId} GROUP BY asn.id, asn.title, c.name, u.real_name, asn.deadline, asn.max_score

SELECT t.id AS teacher_id, t.real_name AS teacher_name, t.teacher_no AS teacher_no,
-- 授课数量 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course c WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id) AS course_count,
-- 授课学生总数（去重：一个学生选多门课只算一次） (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cs2.student_id) FROM course_student cs2 WHERE cs2.course_id IN ( SELECT c2.id FROM course c2 WHERE c2.teacher_id = t.id )) AS total_students,
-- 发布作业总数 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment asn2 WHERE asn2.course_id IN ( SELECT c3.id FROM course c3 WHERE c3.teacher_id = t.id )) AS assignment_count,
-- 收到的总提交数 COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) AS total_submissions,
-- 迟交总数 SUM(CASE WHEN sub.is_late = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_late_submissions,
-- 迟交率 ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN sub.is_late = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) END, 1 ) AS late_rate,
-- 已批改数 COUNT(g.id) AS graded_count,
-- 待批改数 COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) - COUNT(g.id) AS pending_grading_count,
-- 批改进度 ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COUNT(g.id) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) END, 1 ) AS grading_progress,
-- 给出的平均分 ROUND(AVG(g.score), 1) AS average_score_given
FROM user t LEFT JOIN course c2_join ON c2_join.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN assignment asn ON asn.course_id = c2_join.id LEFT JOIN submission sub ON sub.assignment_id = asn.id LEFT JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id
WHERE t.role = 'TEACHER' AND t.status = 1
GROUP BY t.id, t.real_name, t.teacher_no ORDER BY course_count DESC, total_submissions DESC

SELECT t.id AS teacher_id, t.real_name AS teacher_name, t.teacher_no AS teacher_no, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course c WHERE c.teacher_id = t.id) AS course_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cs2.student_id) FROM course_student cs2 WHERE cs2.course_id IN ( SELECT c2.id FROM course c2 WHERE c2.teacher_id = t.id )) AS total_students, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment asn2 WHERE asn2.course_id IN ( SELECT c3.id FROM course c3 WHERE c3.teacher_id = t.id )) AS assignment_count, COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) AS total_submissions, SUM(CASE WHEN sub.is_late = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_late_submissions, ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN sub.is_late = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) END, 1 ) AS late_rate, COUNT(g.id) AS graded_count, COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) - COUNT(g.id) AS pending_grading_count, ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE COUNT(g.id) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT sub.id) END, 1 ) AS grading_progress, ROUND(AVG(g.score), 1) AS average_score_given FROM user t LEFT JOIN course c2_join ON c2_join.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN assignment asn ON asn.course_id = c2_join.id LEFT JOIN submission sub ON sub.assignment_id = asn.id LEFT JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE t.id = #{teacherId} GROUP BY t.id, t.real_name, t.teacher_no

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user) AS total_users, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE role = 'STUDENT') AS student_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE role = 'TEACHER') AS teacher_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE role = 'ADMIN') AS admin_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course) AS total_courses, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment) AS total_assignments, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission) AS total_submissions, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade) AS total_grades, ROUND( CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grade) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission) END, 1 ) AS grading_progress, ROUND(AVG(g.score), 1) AS system_avg_score FROM grade g

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student cs WHERE cs.student_id = #{studentId}) AS enrolled_courses, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment asn WHERE asn.course_id IN ( SELECT cs2.course_id FROM course_student cs2 WHERE cs2.student_id = #{studentId} ) AND asn.status = 1 AND asn.id NOT IN ( SELECT sub.assignment_id FROM submission sub WHERE sub.student_id = #{studentId} )) AS pending_assignments, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub WHERE sub.student_id = #{studentId}) AS submitted_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM submission sub INNER JOIN grade g ON g.submission_id = sub.id WHERE sub.student_id = #{studentId}) AS graded_count, ROUND(COALESCE(( SELECT AVG(g2.score) FROM submission sub2 INNER JOIN grade g2 ON g2.submission_id = sub2.id WHERE sub2.student_id = #{studentId} ), 0), 1) AS average_score
